title: Neon Clash Invitational
description: 5v5 tactical showdown featuring top campus squads with live shoutcasting and MVP awards.

title: Campus Ultimate Team Cup
description: Head-to-head elimination bracket where players build squads and compete in high-pressure finals.

title: Battle Royale Scrims
description: Custom room practice series focused on strategy, rotations, and end-zone execution for club players.

title: KUET LAN Night
description: Community LAN event with mini challenges, mixed teams, and coaching sessions from senior members.

title: Weekend Open Lobby
description: Open community match where newcomers can squad up with core members and learn competitive play.

title: E-Football Pro Qualifier
description: Qualification rounds to select KUET representatives for inter-university esports competition.
